name: pdf-charts
description: Chart rendering for PDF documents — bar, line, pie, combo charts as PDF drawing operations.
author: system

hints.overview: Render bar, line, pie, and combo charts in PDF documents. Charts are returned as PdfElement objects for use with addContent(). All chart values must be finite numbers.
criticalRules: series.name is REQUIRED for all chart data series
All values must be finite numbers — not null, undefined, NaN, or strings
series.values.length must equal categories.length for bar/line/combo charts
Maximum 24 series per chart, 100 categories, 100 pie slices
antiPatterns: Don't pass empty categories or series arrays
Don't mix up pieChart (labels + values) with barChart/lineChart (categories + series)
commonPatterns: import { barChart } from 'ha:pdf-charts'; addContent(doc, [barChart({ categories: ['Q1','Q2'], series: [{ name: 'Rev', values: [100,200] }] })]);
